---
title: "Automating my Strava"
author: "Håvard Berland"
subtitle: Equinor Developer Conference 2026
format: 
  revealjs:
    theme: [default, custom.sccs]

<! -- good themes: moon, sky -->
---

## Me

::: columns

::: {.column width=50%}

- Marathon runner (2:33:xx in Barcelona this Sunday)
- Developer, both at work and at home
- 2-3 running workouts a day

:::
::: {.column width=50%}

![](gfx/oslomaraton-crop.jpg)

:::
:::

## Problem at hand
:::{.incremental}
- 2-3 workouts a day. Stick to "Morning Run", "Afternoon Run", etc?
- Automate fiddling in the Strava app for every workout
- Analyze runs, make statistics
:::

## Data flow

![](gfx/strava-dataflow.png)

## Features 

:::{layout-ncol="2"}

:::{#first-col}

::: {.fragment fragment-index=1}
- Detects my commutes
:::
::: {.fragment fragment-index=2}
- Phone notification to select shoe-pair, and applies shoe to my return commute
:::

![](gfx/pushover.png){.fragment fragment-index=2}
:::

:::{#second-col}

![](gfx/tiljobb.png){.fragment fragment-index=1}


:::

:::

## Features

:::{layout-ncol="2"}

:::{#first-col}

- Analyzes interval sessions. Rigid running protocol for every Tuesday, Thursday and Saturday 
![](gfx/torsdag.png){.fragment fragment-index=4}
:::

:::{#second-col}

![](gfx/tirsdag.png){.fragment fragment-index=3}


:::

:::


## Technical

::: {.fragment fragment-index=1}
- Strava calls my home server through ngrok reverse proxy, activity supplied as
  a `dict` to a Python function in my FastAPI application
:::
:::{.fragment .fade-out fragment-index=2}
  ```python
      if activity.get("device_name", "") == "Zwift Run":
          start_time = datetime.fromisoformat(activity["start_date_local"])
          if start_time.weekday() == 0 and 8 < start_time.hour < 11: 
              updates["name"] = "Gym på jobben"
              updates["description"] = "Zwift"
          update_activity(activity_id, updates)
  ```
:::

::: {.fragment fragment-index=4}
- Looks up XML file from Polar on local disk, and performs analysis of the workout
:::
::: {.fragment fragment-index=5}
- Updates tokens regularly, and performs initial token handshake (OAuth2)
:::
::: {.fragment fragment-index=6}
- https://github.com/berland/strava
:::

## Data analysis

- Interval speed for Tuesday 1000m over time
- Crossplot heart rate vs speed
